description_full:
📍 Remote (India) | 🕐 1 day ago - May 15, 2026 | 💼 Full-Time

The company is building India’s most trusted crypto education & media brand through podcasts, content, and community. They are seeking a Business Development Executive who can help scale sponsorship revenue through strong brand partnerships and outreach.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Reach out to brands & sponsors daily
- Close podcast sponsorship deals
- Build long-term brand partnerships
- Manage sponsor pipeline & follow-ups
- Create proposals and sponsorship pitches

🔑 Requirements:
- Strong communication & sales skills
- Confident in outreach and pitching
- Hustler mindset with strong follow-up discipline
- Experience in sales, creator economy, Web3, or partnerships is a plus

Success in this role means generating consistent sponsorship revenue and building long-term sponsor relationships.

📩 To apply: Fill out the form here: https://forms.gle/SBEjT1H6HkKVG5Po9

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/aditya-kumar-b49b02246_business-development-share-7460942190437974016-J4c3
